positive.stdout:

% SZS output start Saturation.

    rating_gt4(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    provides_takeout(hamden_plaza)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~yelp_recommended(sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~rating_gt4(X0) | yelp_recommended(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~provides_takeout(sK0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~many_negative_reviews(X0) | ~yelp_recommended(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    many_negative_reviews(sK0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~popular_among_locals(X0) | rating_gt4(X0)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    yelp_recommended(hamden_plaza)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
